assertions.title: RunPage shows video recording status during audit

steps.action: Navigate to RunPage for pre-created audit e2ed0938
steps.observed: RunPage loaded with full activity timeline showing completed audit

Timeline shows 4 VIDEO phase events: 'Recorded session video for cookie consent / privacy sensitive', 'Recorded session video for cookie consent / cost sensitive', 'Recorded session video for checkout flow / privacy sensitive', 'Recorded session video for checkout flow / cost sensitive'

steps.action: Check API response for pre-created audit
steps.observed: API response contains 4 events with phase='video' and messages matching 'Recorded session video for {scenario} / {persona}'

steps.action: Submit new audit and check RunPage
steps.expected: New audit RunPage also shows video events
steps.observed: New audit 2479c0d6 RunPage shows 6 VIDEO phase events in the activity timeline
No console errors

assertions.title: All new features reachable through normal navigation

steps.expected: SubmitPage loads with URL input form
steps.observed: SubmitPage loaded with URL input, scenario cards, persona cards, and 'Start trust audit' button
After filling URL 'https://test-flow-validator.example.com' and clicking 'Start trust audit', navigated to /audits/2479c0d6-58b7-4802-acd6-e934368c2d65/run
Navigated to /audits/2479c0d6-58b7-4802-acd6-e934368c2d65/report

steps.action: Scroll to video section on ReportPage
steps.expected: Session Recordings section visible after Screenshot Timeline
steps.observed: Session Recordings section visible at correct position (after Screenshot Timeline heading), showing 6 video cards per scenario-persona pair
Navigated to /audits/2479c0d6-58b7-4802-acd6-e934368c2d65/diff (PersonaDiffPage)
Each persona column shows 'Session Recordings' section with 'Watch #1' and 'Watch #2' links
No console errors at any navigation step

assertions.title: Full single-URL audit flow with video and regulatory PDF

steps.observed: Navigated to RunPage at /audits/2479c0d6-58b7-4802-acd6-e934368c2d65/run

steps.action: Check RunPage for video recording indicator events
steps.observed: Timeline shows 6 VIDEO phase events with 'Recorded session video for ...' messages

steps.action: Navigate to ReportPage via 'Open report' link
steps.observed: ReportPage loaded at /audits/2479c0d6-58b7-4802-acd6-e934368c2d65/report

steps.expected: Video section appears after Screenshot Timeline
steps.observed: Sections in order: Executive summary → Persona comparison → Scenario breakdown → Screenshot Timeline → Session Recordings → Findings and evidence. Session Recordings correctly positioned after Screenshot Timeline.

steps.action: Verify Session Recordings displays video cards
steps.expected: Video player section visible with per-scenario-persona cards
steps.observed: Session Recordings section shows 6 video cards (Cookie Consent x Privacy Sensitive, Cookie Consent x Cost Sensitive, etc.) with 'Video unavailable' fallback (expected for 37-byte mock .webm placeholders)

steps.action: Check for regulatory PDF download button
steps.expected: Regulatory PDF button may not exist (future milestone)
steps.observed: No 'Download Compliance Report' button present. Only 'Download PDF' (existing HTML report PDF) visible. Regulatory PDF milestone not yet implemented.

steps.action: Check pre-created audit video file serving
steps.observed: HEAD /artifacts/videos/e2ed0938.../cookie_consent_privacy_sensitive.webm → 200 OK, Content-Type: video/webm, Content-Length: 37
No console errors
No 404 errors observed in console or page rendering

assertions.issues: Regulatory PDF download button not present on ReportPage — blocked by regulatory-pdf milestone not yet implemented. Video player section works correctly. Mock video files (37 bytes) cause 'Video unavailable' fallback which is correct error handling behavior (VAL-VIDEO-004 scope).

frictions.description: SubmitPage scenario 'Cancellation Flow' sends 'cancellation_flow' to API but backend expects 'subscription_cancellation', causing 422 validation error on first submit attempt
frictions.resolution: Deselected 'Cancellation Flow' and other non-default scenarios, keeping only 'Cookie Consent' and 'Checkout Flow' for successful submission

frictions.description: agent-browser 'fill' command fails with CSS selector parse error when value contains '://' (URL-like strings). Had to use 'find label ... fill' semantic locator instead
frictions.resolution: Used 'agent-browser find label "Target URL" fill "https://..."' instead of 'fill @e5 "https://..."'

blockers.description: Regulatory PDF download button ('Download Compliance Report') not present on ReportPage — regulatory-pdf milestone not yet implemented
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked all buttons on ReportPage: only 'Open HTML report', 'Download PDF', 'Compare Personas', 'Back to run log', 'Back to History' present. No compliance/regulatory PDF button exists.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-VIDEO-006 passed (4+ video-phase events visible in RunPage timeline). VAL-CROSS-001 passed (full navigation SubmitPage → RunPage → ReportPage with video section → PersonaDiffPage with per-persona video links). VAL-CROSS-002 passed with note that regulatory PDF button is blocked by future milestone — video player section (Session Recordings) works correctly and is positioned after Screenshot Timeline. No console errors or 404s throughout.
